arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 hosted zone.

caller_reference.description: A unique string that identifies the request to create the hosted zone.

comment.description: Any comments or notes about the hosted zone.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the hosted zone by AWS.

linked_service_description.description: Description of the service linked to the hosted zone.

linked_service_principal.description: The principal for the linked service associated with the hosted zone.

name.description: The name of the domain for the hosted zone.

name_servers.description: A list of name servers associated with the hosted zone.

primary_name_server.description: The primary name server for the hosted zone.

resource_record_set_count.description: The number of resource record sets in the hosted zone.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the hosted zone.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC associated with the hosted zone, if applicable.

zone_id.description: The ID of the hosted zone.
